    private global::Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.RenderFragment RenderTemplateField(DashboardWrongShapeProjection row, string columnPropertyName)
    {
        if (row is null || string.IsNullOrEmpty(columnPropertyName))
        {
            return static _ => { };
        }

        switch (columnPropertyName)
        {
            case "Id":
                return HasProjectionSlot("Id")
                    ? RenderSlotField(row,
                        fieldName: "Id",
                        displayName: "Id",
                        format: (string?)null,
                        order: (int?)null,
                        isFieldReadOnly: false,
                        description: (string?)null,
                        value: row.Id,
                        renderDefault: __ctx => RenderTemplateDefaultField(__ctx.Parent, "Id"))
                    : RenderTemplateDefaultField(row, "Id");
            case "FreeFormNote":
                return HasProjectionSlot("FreeFormNote")
                    ? RenderSlotField(row,
                        fieldName: "FreeFormNote",
                        displayName: "Free Form Note",
                        format: (string?)null,
                        order: (int?)null,
                        isFieldReadOnly: false,
                        description: (string?)null,
                        value: row.FreeFormNote,
                        renderDefault: __ctx => RenderTemplateDefaultField(__ctx.Parent, "FreeFormNote"))
                    : RenderTemplateDefaultField(row, "FreeFormNote");
            case "RecordedAt":
                return HasProjectionSlot("RecordedAt")
                    ? RenderSlotField(row,
                        fieldName: "RecordedAt",
                        displayName: "Recorded At",
                        format: "d",
                        order: (int?)null,
                        isFieldReadOnly: false,
                        description: (string?)null,
                        value: row.RecordedAt,
                        renderDefault: __ctx => RenderTemplateDefaultField(__ctx.Parent, "RecordedAt"))
                    : RenderTemplateDefaultField(row, "RecordedAt");
            default:
                return static _ => { };
        }
    }

    private global::Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.RenderFragment RenderTemplateDefaultField(DashboardWrongShapeProjection row, string columnPropertyName)
    {
        if (row is null || string.IsNullOrEmpty(columnPropertyName))
        {
            return static _ => { };
        }

        switch (columnPropertyName)
        {
            case "Id":
                return builder =>
                {
                    if (row is null) { return; }
                    int fieldSeq = 0;
                    builder.AddContent(fieldSeq++, row.Id.ToString());
                };
            case "FreeFormNote":
                return builder =>
                {
                    if (row is null) { return; }
                    int fieldSeq = 0;
                    builder.AddContent(fieldSeq++, row.FreeFormNote.ToString());
                };
            case "RecordedAt":
                return builder =>
                {
                    if (row is null) { return; }
                    int fieldSeq = 0;
                    builder.AddContent(fieldSeq++, row.RecordedAt.ToString("d", CultureInfo.CurrentCulture));
                };
            default:
                return static _ => { };
        }
    }

    private global::Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.RenderFragment RenderTemplateRow(DashboardWrongShapeProjection row)
    {
        if (row is null)
        {
            return static _ => { };
        }

        return builder =>
        {
            int rowSeq = 0;
            builder.OpenElement(rowSeq++, "div");
            builder.AddAttribute(rowSeq++, "class", "fc-template-row");
            {
            builder.OpenElement(rowSeq++, "span");
            builder.AddAttribute(rowSeq++, "class", "fc-template-field");
            builder.AddAttribute(rowSeq++, "data-fc-field", "Id");
            RenderTemplateField(row, "Id")(builder);
            builder.CloseElement();
            }
            {
            builder.OpenElement(rowSeq++, "span");
            builder.AddAttribute(rowSeq++, "class", "fc-template-field");
            builder.AddAttribute(rowSeq++, "data-fc-field", "FreeFormNote");
            RenderTemplateField(row, "FreeFormNote")(builder);
            builder.CloseElement();
            }
            {
            builder.OpenElement(rowSeq++, "span");
            builder.AddAttribute(rowSeq++, "class", "fc-template-field");
            builder.AddAttribute(rowSeq++, "data-fc-field", "RecordedAt");
            RenderTemplateField(row, "RecordedAt")(builder);
            builder.CloseElement();
            }
            builder.CloseElement();
        };
    }

    private bool HasProjectionSlot(string fieldName)
        => ProjectionSlotRegistry.Resolve(typeof(DashboardWrongShapeProjection), (Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole?)Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole.Dashboard, fieldName) is not null;

    private global::Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.RenderFragment RenderSlotField<TField>(
        DashboardWrongShapeProjection row,
        string fieldName,
        string displayName,
        string? format,
        int? order,
        bool isFieldReadOnly,
        string? description,
        TField? value,
        global::Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.RenderFragment<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.FieldSlotContext<DashboardWrongShapeProjection, TField>> renderDefault)
    {
        return builder =>
        {
            var __renderContext = RenderContext ?? new global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.RenderContext(
                TenantId: string.Empty,
                UserId: string.Empty,
                Mode: global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.FcRenderMode.Server,
                DensityLevel: global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.DensityLevel.Comfortable,
                IsReadOnly: false);
            var __field = new global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.FieldDescriptor(
                Name: fieldName,
                TypeName: typeof(TField).FullName ?? typeof(TField).Name,
                IsNullable: System.Nullable.GetUnderlyingType(typeof(TField)) is not null || !typeof(TField).IsValueType,
                DisplayName: displayName,
                Format: format,
                Order: order,
                IsReadOnly: isFieldReadOnly,
                Hints: null,
                Description: description);
            builder.OpenComponent<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Rendering.FcFieldSlotHost<DashboardWrongShapeProjection, TField>>(0);
            builder.AddAttribute(1, "Parent", row);
            builder.AddAttribute(2, "Value", value);
            builder.AddAttribute(3, "Field", __field);
            builder.AddAttribute(4, "RenderContext", __renderContext);
            builder.AddAttribute(5, "ProjectionRole", (Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole?)Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole.Dashboard);
            builder.AddAttribute(6, "RenderDefault", renderDefault);
            builder.CloseComponent();
        };
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    protected override void OnInitialized()
    {
        DashboardWrongShapeProjectionState.StateChanged += OnStateChanged;
        LoadedPageState.StateChanged += OnStateChanged;
        GridNavigationState.StateChanged += OnStateChanged;
        ReconciliationSweepState.StateChanged += OnStateChanged;
        ExpandedRowState.StateChanged += OnStateChanged;
    }

    private void OnStateChanged(object? sender, EventArgs e)
        => InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);

    /// <inheritdoc />
    protected override async Task OnAfterRenderAsync(bool firstRender)
    {
        if (firstRender)
        {
            // Story 4-4 T2.5 / D4 — DotNetObjectReference scoped to the view; disposed in DisposeAsync.
            _dotNetRef = global::Microsoft.JSInterop.DotNetObjectReference.Create<object>(this);

            // Story 4-4 T2.6 / AC7 — within-session scroll restore. Cross-session is clamped to 0 by D5.
            try
            {
                var snapshot = CurrentGridSnapshot();
                if (snapshot is not null && snapshot.ScrollTop > 0)
                {
                    await ScrollInterop.ScrollToOffsetAsync(_viewKey, snapshot.ScrollTop).ConfigureAwait(true);
                }
            }
            catch (global::Microsoft.JSInterop.JSDisconnectedException) { /* circuit teardown */ }
            catch (System.Threading.Tasks.TaskCanceledException) { /* circuit teardown */ }
        }

        RegisterVisibleProjectionLane();
    }

    private async Task OnScrollAsync()
    {
        if (_dotNetRef is null) { return; }

        try
        {
            await ScrollInterop
                .CaptureScrollAsync(_viewKey, scrollTop: 0d, _dotNetRef, System.Threading.CancellationToken.None)
                .ConfigureAwait(true);
        }
        catch (global::Microsoft.JSInterop.JSDisconnectedException) { /* circuit teardown */ }
        catch (System.Threading.Tasks.TaskCanceledException) { /* circuit teardown */ }
    }

    [global::Microsoft.JSInterop.JSInvokable]
    public void HandleScrollAsync(string viewKey, double scrollTop)
    {
        if (!string.Equals(viewKey, _viewKey, StringComparison.Ordinal) || double.IsNaN(scrollTop) || double.IsInfinity(scrollTop) || scrollTop < 0) { return; }
        Dispatcher.Dispatch(new global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.ScrollCapturedAction(viewKey, scrollTop));
    }

    private async ValueTask<global::Microsoft.FluentUI.AspNetCore.Components.GridItemsProviderResult<DashboardWrongShapeProjection>> LoadPageAsync(global::Microsoft.FluentUI.AspNetCore.Components.GridItemsProviderRequest<DashboardWrongShapeProjection> request)
    {
        var ct = request.CancellationToken;
        var completion = new System.Threading.Tasks.TaskCompletionSource<object>(System.Threading.Tasks.TaskCreationOptions.RunContinuationsAsynchronously);
        var skip = request.StartIndex;
        var take = request.Count ?? ShellOptions.Value.VirtualizationServerSideThreshold;
        var snapshot = CurrentGridSnapshot();
        var filters = QueryFilters(snapshot);
        var searchQuery = SearchQuery(snapshot);
        Dispatcher.Dispatch(new global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.LoadPageAction(
            viewKey: _viewKey,
            skip: skip,
            take: take,
            filters: filters,
            sortColumn: snapshot?.SortColumn,
            sortDescending: snapshot?.SortDescending ?? false,
            searchQuery: searchQuery,
            completion: completion,
            cancellationToken: ct));
        try
        {
            var resolved = await completion.Task.WaitAsync(ct).ConfigureAwait(true);
            var items = resolved as System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList<object>
                ?? System.Array.Empty<object>();
            var typed = new System.Collections.Generic.List<DashboardWrongShapeProjection>(items.Count);
            foreach (var item in items)
            {
                if (item is DashboardWrongShapeProjection typedItem)
                {
                    typed.Add(typedItem);
                }
            }
            int totalCount = LoadedPageState.Value.TotalCountByKey.TryGetValue(_viewKey, out var c) ? c : typed.Count;
            return new global::Microsoft.FluentUI.AspNetCore.Components.GridItemsProviderResult<DashboardWrongShapeProjection> { Items = typed, TotalItemCount = totalCount };
        }
        catch (System.OperationCanceledException)
        {
            return new global::Microsoft.FluentUI.AspNetCore.Components.GridItemsProviderResult<DashboardWrongShapeProjection> { Items = System.Array.Empty<DashboardWrongShapeProjection>(), TotalItemCount = 0 };
        }
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public async ValueTask DisposeAsync()
    {
        DashboardWrongShapeProjectionState.StateChanged -= OnStateChanged;
        LoadedPageState.StateChanged -= OnStateChanged;
        GridNavigationState.StateChanged -= OnStateChanged;
        ReconciliationSweepState.StateChanged -= OnStateChanged;
        ExpandedRowState.StateChanged -= OnStateChanged;
        _projectionFallbackLaneRegistration?.Dispose();
        _projectionFallbackLaneRegistration = null;
        _registeredProjectionFallbackLaneKey = null;
        try { Dispatcher.Dispatch(new global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.ClearPendingPagesAction(_viewKey)); }
        catch (System.ObjectDisposedException) { /* store already disposed */ }
        try { Dispatcher.Dispatch(new global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.CollapseRowAction(_ephemeralViewKey)); }
        catch (System.ObjectDisposedException) { /* store already disposed */ }
        try { await ScrollInterop.DisposeViewKeyAsync(_viewKey).ConfigureAwait(true); }
        catch (global::Microsoft.JSInterop.JSDisconnectedException) { /* circuit teardown */ }
        catch (System.Threading.Tasks.TaskCanceledException) { /* circuit teardown */ }
        _dotNetRef?.Dispose();
        _dotNetRef = null;
    }

    private System.Threading.Tasks.Task HandleRowClickAsync(DashboardWrongShapeProjection row)
    {
        if (row is null) { return System.Threading.Tasks.Task.CompletedTask; }
        object key = _itemKeyAccessor(row);
        var entry = ExpandedRowState.Value.GetEntry(_ephemeralViewKey);
        if (entry.HasValue && entry.Value.ItemKey.Equals(key))
        {
            Dispatcher.Dispatch(new global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.CollapseRowAction(_ephemeralViewKey));
        }
        else
        {
            Dispatcher.Dispatch(new global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.ExpandRowAction(_ephemeralViewKey, key));
        }

        return System.Threading.Tasks.Task.CompletedTask;
    }

    private global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.GridViewSnapshot? CurrentGridSnapshot()
        => GridNavigationState.Value.ViewStates.TryGetValue(_viewKey, out var snapshot) ? snapshot : null;

    private static System.Collections.Immutable.IImmutableDictionary<string, string> QueryFilters(global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.GridViewSnapshot? snapshot)
    {
        if (snapshot is null) { return System.Collections.Immutable.ImmutableDictionary<string, string>.Empty; }
        return snapshot.Filters
            .Remove(global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.ReservedFilterKeys.SearchKey)
            .Remove(global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.VirtualizationReservedKeys.HiddenColumnsKey);
    }

    private static string? SearchQuery(global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.GridViewSnapshot? snapshot)
        => snapshot is not null
            && snapshot.Filters.TryGetValue(global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.ReservedFilterKeys.SearchKey, out var query)
            && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(query)
                ? query
                : null;

    private static string ProjectionTypeFromViewKey()
    {
        int separator = _viewKey.IndexOf(':');
        return separator > 0 && separator < _viewKey.Length - 1 ? _viewKey[(separator + 1)..] : _viewKey;
    }

    private void RegisterVisibleProjectionLane()
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(RenderContext?.TenantId))
        {
            return;
        }

        var snapshot = CurrentGridSnapshot();
        var filters = QueryFilters(snapshot);
        var searchQuery = SearchQuery(snapshot);
        int take = ShellOptions.Value.VirtualizationServerSideThreshold;
        string laneKey = string.Join("\u001d", RenderContext.TenantId, ProjectionTypeFromViewKey(), "0", take.ToString(System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture), snapshot?.SortColumn ?? string.Empty, snapshot?.SortDescending == true ? "desc" : "asc", searchQuery ?? string.Empty, string.Join("\u001f", filters.OrderBy(static kv => kv.Key, StringComparer.Ordinal).Select(static kv => kv.Key + "\u001e" + kv.Value)));
        if (string.Equals(_registeredProjectionFallbackLaneKey, laneKey, StringComparison.Ordinal))
        {
            return;
        }

        _projectionFallbackLaneRegistration?.Dispose();
        _projectionFallbackLaneRegistration = ProjectionFallbackRefreshScheduler.RegisterLane(new global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.State.ProjectionConnection.ProjectionFallbackLane(
            _viewKey,
            ProjectionTypeFromViewKey(),
            RenderContext.TenantId,
            0,
            take,
            filters,
            snapshot?.SortColumn,
            snapshot?.SortDescending ?? false,
            searchQuery));
        _registeredProjectionFallbackLaneKey = laneKey;
    }

    private string GridHostClass()
    {
        if (ReconciliationSweepState.Value.MarkersByViewKey.TryGetValue(_viewKey, out var marker) && marker.ExpiresAt > TimeProvider.GetUtcNow())
        {
            return "fc-datagrid-host fc-reconciliation-sweep";
        }

        return "fc-datagrid-host";
    }

    private static bool AnyRealFilterActive(global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.GridViewSnapshot? snapshot)
    {
        if (snapshot is null) { return false; }
        foreach (var filter in snapshot.Filters)
        {
            if (!filter.Key.StartsWith("__", StringComparison.Ordinal) && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(filter.Value))
            {
                return true;
            }
        }
        return false;
    }

    private static System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList<string> ResolveHiddenColumns(global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.GridViewSnapshot? snapshot)
        => System.Array.Empty<string>();

    private static string Truncate(string value, int maxLength)
        => value.Length <= maxLength ? value : value.Substring(0, maxLength - 1) + "\u2026";

    private static string HumanizeEnumLabel(string value)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(value))
        {
            return value;
        }

        var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder(value.Length + 10);

        for (int i = 0; i < value.Length; i++)
        {
            char c = value[i];

            if (i == 0)
            {
                sb.Append(char.ToUpperInvariant(c));
                continue;
            }

            bool isUpper = c >= 'A' && c <= 'Z';
            bool prevIsUpper = value[i - 1] >= 'A' && value[i - 1] <= 'Z';
            bool prevIsLower = value[i - 1] >= 'a' && value[i - 1] <= 'z';
            bool prevIsDigit = value[i - 1] >= '0' && value[i - 1] <= '9';

            if (isUpper && prevIsLower)
            {
                sb.Append(' ');
                sb.Append(c);
            }
            else if (isUpper && prevIsUpper && i + 1 < value.Length)
            {
                char next = value[i + 1];
                bool nextIsLower = next >= 'a' && next <= 'z';
                if (nextIsLower && CountConsecutiveUppersBefore(value, i) + 1 >= 3)
                {
                    sb.Append(' ');
                }

                sb.Append(c);
            }
            else if (isUpper && prevIsDigit)
            {
                sb.Append(' ');
                sb.Append(c);
            }
            else
            {
                sb.Append(c);
            }
        }

        return sb.ToString();
    }

    private static int CountConsecutiveUppersBefore(string value, int index)
    {
        int count = 0;
        for (int i = index - 1; i >= 0; i--)
        {
            if (value[i] >= 'A' && value[i] <= 'Z')
            {
                count++;
            }
            else
            {
                break;
            }
        }

        return count;
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    protected override void BuildRenderTree(RenderTreeBuilder builder)
    {
        var state = DashboardWrongShapeProjectionState.Value;
        int seq = 0;
        #if DEBUG
        if (DevModeServices.GetService(typeof(global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Services.DevMode.IDevModeOverlayController)) is global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Services.DevMode.IDevModeOverlayController)
        {
            builder.OpenComponent<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.DevMode.FcDevModeAnnotation>(seq++);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Node", new global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.DevMode.ComponentTreeNode(
                AnnotationKey: "DashboardWrongShapeProjection-view",
                Convention: new global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.DevMode.ConventionDescriptor("DashboardWrongShapeProjection generated projection view", "Generated projection view surface.", "Use a Level 2 template for body changes, Level 4 for full replacement.", global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.DevMode.CustomizationLevel.Default),
                ContractTypeName: "DashboardWrongShapeProjection",
                CurrentLevel: global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.DevMode.CustomizationLevel.Default,
                OriginatingProjectionTypeName: typeof(DashboardWrongShapeProjection).FullName ?? typeof(DashboardWrongShapeProjection).Name,
                Role: (Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole?)Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole.Dashboard,
                FieldAccessor: (string?)null,
                Children: global::System.Collections.Immutable.ImmutableArray<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.DevMode.ComponentTreeNode>.Empty,
                RenderEpoch: 0,
                ComponentTreeContractVersion: global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.DevMode.ComponentTreeContractVersion.Current,
                DescriptorHash: "DashboardWrongShapeProjection:DashboardWrongShapeProjection-view",
                SourceComponentIdentity: "DashboardWrongShapeProjection.DashboardWrongShapeProjection-view",
                StaleReasons: global::System.Collections.Immutable.ImmutableArray<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.DevMode.ComponentTreeStaleReason>.Empty,
                IsUnsupported: false));
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "CssClass", "fc-devmode-annotation");
            builder.CloseComponent();
        }
        #endif
        _density = RenderContext?.DensityLevel ?? global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.DensityLevel.Comfortable;
        var gridSnapshot = CurrentGridSnapshot();
        var hiddenColumns = ResolveHiddenColumns(gridSnapshot);
        var hiddenColumnSet = new System.Collections.Generic.HashSet<string>(hiddenColumns, StringComparer.Ordinal);
        var anyRealFilterActive = AnyRealFilterActive(gridSnapshot);

        builder.OpenComponent<Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Rendering.FcProjectionSubtitle>(seq++);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ProjectionType", typeof(DashboardWrongShapeProjection));
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Role", (Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole?)Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole.Dashboard);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "WhenState", (string?)null);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "FallbackCount", state.Items?.Count ?? 0);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "DistinctStatusCount", (int?)null);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "EntityLabel", "Dashboard Wrong Shape");
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "EntityPluralLabel", "dashboard wrong shapes");
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "IsLoading", state.IsLoading);
        builder.CloseComponent();

        if (state.IsLoading)
        {
            builder.OpenComponent<Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Rendering.FcProjectionLoadingSkeleton>(seq++);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ColumnCount", 3);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "RowCount", 5);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Layout", Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Rendering.SkeletonLayout.DataGrid);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "EntityLabel", "dashboard wrong shapes");
            builder.CloseComponent();
            return;
        }

        if (state.Items is null || state.Items.Count == 0)
        {
            builder.OpenComponent<Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Rendering.FcProjectionEmptyPlaceholder>(seq++);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ProjectionType", typeof(DashboardWrongShapeProjection));
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Role", (Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole?)Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole.Dashboard);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "EntityPluralOverride", "dashboard wrong shapes");
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "CtaCommandName", (string?)null);
            builder.CloseComponent();
            return;
        }

        seq = 100;
        global::Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.RenderFragment defaultBody = (global::Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Rendering.RenderTreeBuilder __bb) =>
        {
            var builder = __bb;
            int seq = 100;
        // Story 4-5 — resolve expanded-row state for this render pass.
        global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.State.ExpandedRow.ExpandedRowEntry? _expandedEntry = ExpandedRowState.Value.GetEntry(_ephemeralViewKey);
        object? _expandedItemKey = _expandedEntry?.ItemKey;
        DashboardWrongShapeProjection? _expandedItem = null;
        if (_expandedItemKey is not null)
        {
            foreach (var __candidate in state.Items)
            {
                if (_itemKeyAccessor(__candidate).Equals(_expandedItemKey))
                {
                    _expandedItem = __candidate;
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
        bool _expandedItemHiddenByFilter = _expandedItemKey is not null && _expandedItem is null;

        builder.OpenComponent<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.DataGrid.FcExpandedRowHiddenBanner>(seq++);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ViewKey", _viewKey);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "IsHiddenByFilter", _expandedItemHiddenByFilter);
        builder.CloseComponent();

        builder.OpenComponent<FluentDataGrid<DashboardWrongShapeProjection>>(seq++);
        builder.SetKey(_density);
        if (state.Items.Count >= ShellOptions.Value.VirtualizationServerSideThreshold)
        {
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ItemsProvider", (global::Microsoft.FluentUI.AspNetCore.Components.GridItemsProvider<DashboardWrongShapeProjection>)LoadPageAsync);
        }
        else
        {
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Items", state.Items.AsQueryable());
        }
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Virtualize", true);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "DisplayMode", Microsoft.FluentUI.AspNetCore.Components.DataGridDisplayMode.Table);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ItemSize", Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Rendering.DataGridDensityMetrics.ResolveRowHeightPx(_density));
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "OverscanCount", 3);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ItemKey", (System.Func<DashboardWrongShapeProjection, object>)_itemKeyAccessor);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "RowClass", (System.Func<DashboardWrongShapeProjection, string?>)(row => _expandedItemKey is not null && _itemKeyAccessor(row).Equals(_expandedItemKey) ? "fc-row-expanded" : null));
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "OnRowClick", global::Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.EventCallback.Factory.Create<FluentDataGridRow<DashboardWrongShapeProjection>>(this, row => row?.Item is null ? System.Threading.Tasks.Task.CompletedTask : HandleRowClickAsync(row.Item)));

        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder b) =>
        {
            int colSeq = 200;

            // Text column: Id
            if (HasProjectionSlot("Id"))
            {
                b.OpenComponent<TemplateColumn<DashboardWrongShapeProjection>>(colSeq++);
                b.AddAttribute(colSeq++, "Title", "Id");
                b.AddAttribute(colSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment<DashboardWrongShapeProjection>)(item => RenderSlotField(item,
                    fieldName: "Id",
                    displayName: "Id",
                    format: (string?)null,
                    order: (int?)null,
                    isFieldReadOnly: false,
                    description: (string?)null,
                    value: item.Id,
                    renderDefault: __ctx => RenderTemplateDefaultField(__ctx.Parent, "Id"))));
                b.CloseComponent();
            }
            else
            {
                b.OpenComponent<PropertyColumn<DashboardWrongShapeProjection, string?>>(colSeq++);
                b.AddAttribute(colSeq++, "Title", "Id");
                b.AddAttribute(colSeq++, "Property", (Expression<Func<DashboardWrongShapeProjection, string?>>)(x => x.Id ?? "\u2014"));
                b.CloseComponent();
            }

            // Text column: FreeFormNote
            if (HasProjectionSlot("FreeFormNote"))
            {
                b.OpenComponent<TemplateColumn<DashboardWrongShapeProjection>>(colSeq++);
                b.AddAttribute(colSeq++, "Title", "Free Form Note");
                b.AddAttribute(colSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment<DashboardWrongShapeProjection>)(item => RenderSlotField(item,
                    fieldName: "FreeFormNote",
                    displayName: "Free Form Note",
                    format: (string?)null,
                    order: (int?)null,
                    isFieldReadOnly: false,
                    description: (string?)null,
                    value: item.FreeFormNote,
                    renderDefault: __ctx => RenderTemplateDefaultField(__ctx.Parent, "FreeFormNote"))));
                b.CloseComponent();
            }
            else
            {
                b.OpenComponent<PropertyColumn<DashboardWrongShapeProjection, string?>>(colSeq++);
                b.AddAttribute(colSeq++, "Title", "Free Form Note");
                b.AddAttribute(colSeq++, "Property", (Expression<Func<DashboardWrongShapeProjection, string?>>)(x => x.FreeFormNote ?? "\u2014"));
                b.CloseComponent();
            }

            // DateTime column: RecordedAt
            if (HasProjectionSlot("RecordedAt"))
            {
                b.OpenComponent<TemplateColumn<DashboardWrongShapeProjection>>(colSeq++);
                b.AddAttribute(colSeq++, "Title", "Recorded At");
                b.AddAttribute(colSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment<DashboardWrongShapeProjection>)(item => RenderSlotField(item,
                    fieldName: "RecordedAt",
                    displayName: "Recorded At",
                    format: "d",
                    order: (int?)null,
                    isFieldReadOnly: false,
                    description: (string?)null,
                    value: item.RecordedAt,
                    renderDefault: __ctx => RenderTemplateDefaultField(__ctx.Parent, "RecordedAt"))));
                b.CloseComponent();
            }
            else
            {
                b.OpenComponent<PropertyColumn<DashboardWrongShapeProjection, string?>>(colSeq++);
                b.AddAttribute(colSeq++, "Title", "Recorded At");
                b.AddAttribute(colSeq++, "Property", (Expression<Func<DashboardWrongShapeProjection, string?>>)(x => x.RecordedAt.ToString("d", CultureInfo.CurrentCulture)));
                b.CloseComponent();
            }

            // Story 4-5 — trailing row-action column hosting the expand chevron.
            b.OpenComponent<TemplateColumn<DashboardWrongShapeProjection>>(colSeq++);
            b.AddAttribute(colSeq++, "Title", "");
            b.AddAttribute(colSeq++, "Class", "fc-row-action-column");
            b.AddAttribute(colSeq++, "Width", "40px");
            b.AddAttribute(colSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment<DashboardWrongShapeProjection>)(item => (RenderTreeBuilder rb) =>
            {
                bool _isThisRowExpanded = _expandedItemKey is not null && _itemKeyAccessor(item).Equals(_expandedItemKey) && _expandedItem is not null;
                string _buttonClass = _isThisRowExpanded ? "fc-expand-button fc-expand-button--open" : "fc-expand-button";
                string _ariaLabelKey = _isThisRowExpanded ? "CollapseRowButtonAriaLabelTemplate" : "ExpandRowButtonAriaLabelTemplate";
                string _ariaLabel = FcShellLocalizer[_ariaLabelKey, _itemKeyAccessor(item).ToString() ?? string.Empty].Value;
                rb.OpenComponent<global::Microsoft.FluentUI.AspNetCore.Components.FluentButton>(0);
                rb.AddAttribute(1, "Appearance", global::Microsoft.FluentUI.AspNetCore.Components.ButtonAppearance.Subtle);
                rb.AddAttribute(2, "IconStart", global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Icons.FcFluentIcons.ChevronRight20());
                rb.AddAttribute(3, "Class", _buttonClass);
                rb.AddAttribute(4, "aria-label", _ariaLabel);
                rb.AddAttribute(5, "aria-expanded", _isThisRowExpanded ? "true" : "false");
                rb.AddAttribute(6, "aria-controls", _expandPanelId);
                rb.AddAttribute(7, "OnClick", global::Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.EventCallback.Factory.Create<global::Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Web.MouseEventArgs>(this, _ => HandleRowClickAsync(item)));
                global::Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Web.WebRenderTreeBuilderExtensions.AddEventStopPropagationAttribute(rb, 8, "onclick", true);
                rb.CloseComponent();
            }));
            b.CloseComponent();
        }));

        builder.CloseComponent();

        // Story 4-5 — detail panel host; ChildContent is the factored EmitDetailRecordBody output.
        builder.OpenComponent<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.DataGrid.FcExpandInRowDetail>(seq++);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ViewKey", _ephemeralViewKey);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "PanelId", _expandPanelId);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "HasExpanded", _expandedItem is not null);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "DetailPanelAriaLabel", FcShellLocalizer["ExpandInRowDetailPanelAriaLabelTemplate", _expandedItemKey?.ToString() ?? string.Empty].Value);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "SuppressedAnnouncement", _expandedItemHiddenByFilter ? FcShellLocalizer["ExpandInRowDetailSuppressedByFilterAnnouncement"].Value : null);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder builder) =>
        {
            if (_expandedItem is null) { return; }
            int seq = 800;
        var entity = _expandedItem;

        builder.OpenComponent<FluentCard>(seq++);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder b) =>
        {
            int fieldSeq = 800;

            b.OpenElement(fieldSeq++, "div");
            b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "class", "fc-detail-field");
            b.OpenComponent<FluentLabel>(fieldSeq++);
            b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder labelBuilder) =>
            {
                labelBuilder.AddContent(0, "Id");
            }));
            b.CloseComponent();
            if (HasProjectionSlot("Id"))
            {
                RenderSlotField(entity,
                    fieldName: "Id",
                    displayName: "Id",
                    format: (string?)null,
                    order: (int?)null,
                    isFieldReadOnly: false,
                    description: (string?)null,
                    value: entity.Id,
                    renderDefault: __ctx => (RenderTreeBuilder slotBuilder) =>
                {
                    int slotSeq = 0;
                    slotBuilder.OpenComponent<FluentText>(slotSeq++);
                    slotBuilder.AddAttribute(slotSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder textBuilder) =>
                    {
                        textBuilder.AddContent(0, entity.Id);
                    }));
                    slotBuilder.CloseComponent();
                })(b);
            }
            else
            {
                b.OpenComponent<FluentText>(fieldSeq++);
                b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder textBuilder) =>
                {
                    textBuilder.AddContent(0, entity.Id);
                }));
                b.CloseComponent();
            }
            b.CloseElement();
            b.OpenElement(fieldSeq++, "div");
            b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "class", "fc-detail-field");
            b.OpenComponent<FluentLabel>(fieldSeq++);
            b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder labelBuilder) =>
            {
                labelBuilder.AddContent(0, "Free Form Note");
            }));
            b.CloseComponent();
            if (HasProjectionSlot("FreeFormNote"))
            {
                RenderSlotField(entity,
                    fieldName: "FreeFormNote",
                    displayName: "Free Form Note",
                    format: (string?)null,
                    order: (int?)null,
                    isFieldReadOnly: false,
                    description: (string?)null,
                    value: entity.FreeFormNote,
                    renderDefault: __ctx => (RenderTreeBuilder slotBuilder) =>
                {
                    int slotSeq = 0;
                    slotBuilder.OpenComponent<FluentText>(slotSeq++);
                    slotBuilder.AddAttribute(slotSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder textBuilder) =>
                    {
                        textBuilder.AddContent(0, entity.FreeFormNote);
                    }));
                    slotBuilder.CloseComponent();
                })(b);
            }
            else
            {
                b.OpenComponent<FluentText>(fieldSeq++);
                b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder textBuilder) =>
                {
                    textBuilder.AddContent(0, entity.FreeFormNote);
                }));
                b.CloseComponent();
            }
            b.CloseElement();
            b.OpenElement(fieldSeq++, "div");
            b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "class", "fc-detail-field");
            b.OpenComponent<FluentLabel>(fieldSeq++);
            b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder labelBuilder) =>
            {
                labelBuilder.AddContent(0, "Recorded At");
            }));
            b.CloseComponent();
            if (HasProjectionSlot("RecordedAt"))
            {
                RenderSlotField(entity,
                    fieldName: "RecordedAt",
                    displayName: "Recorded At",
                    format: "d",
                    order: (int?)null,
                    isFieldReadOnly: false,
                    description: (string?)null,
                    value: entity.RecordedAt,
                    renderDefault: __ctx => (RenderTreeBuilder slotBuilder) =>
                {
                    int slotSeq = 0;
                    slotBuilder.OpenComponent<FluentText>(slotSeq++);
                    slotBuilder.AddAttribute(slotSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder textBuilder) =>
                    {
                        textBuilder.AddContent(0, entity.RecordedAt.ToString("d", CultureInfo.CurrentCulture));
                    }));
                    slotBuilder.CloseComponent();
                })(b);
            }
            else
            {
                b.OpenComponent<FluentText>(fieldSeq++);
                b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder textBuilder) =>
                {
                    textBuilder.AddContent(0, entity.RecordedAt.ToString("d", CultureInfo.CurrentCulture));
                }));
                b.CloseComponent();
            }
            b.CloseElement();
        }));
        builder.CloseComponent();
        }));
        builder.CloseComponent();
        };

        builder.AddMarkupContent(seq++, "<!-- Phone-viewport layout (UX-DR7 phone variant) deferred to Story 10-2 -->");

        builder.OpenComponent<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.DataGrid.FcSlowQueryNotice>(seq++);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ViewKey", _viewKey);
        builder.CloseComponent();

        builder.OpenComponent<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.DataGrid.FcMaxItemsCapNotice>(seq++);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ViewKey", _viewKey);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ItemsCount", state.Items.Count);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "AnyRealFilterActive", anyRealFilterActive);
        builder.CloseComponent();

        builder.OpenElement(seq++, "span");
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "class", "fc-row-count");
        builder.AddContent(seq++, $"{state.Items.Count} " + "dashboard wrong shapes");
        builder.CloseElement();

        builder.OpenElement(seq++, "div");
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "class", GridHostClass());
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "data-fc-datagrid", _viewKey);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "onscroll", global::Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.EventCallback.Factory.Create(this, OnScrollAsync));

        var __viewOverrideDescriptor = ProjectionViewOverrideRegistry.Resolve(typeof(DashboardWrongShapeProjection), (Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole?)Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole.Dashboard);
        if (__viewOverrideDescriptor is not null)
        {
            var __viewOverrideContext = new global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.ProjectionViewContext<DashboardWrongShapeProjection>(
                projectionType: typeof(DashboardWrongShapeProjection),
                boundedContext: "Reporting",
                role: (Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole?)Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole.Dashboard,
                items: state.Items ?? (System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList<DashboardWrongShapeProjection>)System.Array.Empty<DashboardWrongShapeProjection>(),
                renderContext: RenderContext,
                columns: _templateColumnsDescriptor,
                sections: _templateSectionsDescriptor,
                lifecycleState: state.IsLoading ? "Loading" : (state.Items?.Count ?? 0) == 0 ? "Empty" : "Loaded",
                entityLabel: "Dashboard Wrong Shape",
                entityPluralLabel: "dashboard wrong shapes",
                defaultBody: defaultBody,
                sectionRenderer: sectionName => string.Equals(sectionName, "Body", System.StringComparison.Ordinal) ? defaultBody : static _ => { },
                rowRenderer: RenderTemplateRow,
                fieldRenderer: RenderTemplateField);

            builder.OpenComponent<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Rendering.FcProjectionViewOverrideHost<DashboardWrongShapeProjection>>(seq++);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Descriptor", __viewOverrideDescriptor);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Context", __viewOverrideContext);
            builder.CloseComponent();
        }
        else
        {
        var __templateDescriptor = ProjectionTemplateRegistry.Resolve(typeof(DashboardWrongShapeProjection), (Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole?)Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole.Dashboard);
        if (__templateDescriptor is not null)
        {
            var __templateContext = new global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.ProjectionTemplateContext<DashboardWrongShapeProjection>(
                projectionType: typeof(DashboardWrongShapeProjection),
                boundedContext: "Reporting",
                role: (Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole?)Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole.Dashboard,
                renderContext: RenderContext,
                items: state.Items ?? (System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList<DashboardWrongShapeProjection>)System.Array.Empty<DashboardWrongShapeProjection>(),
                columns: _templateColumnsDescriptor,
                sections: _templateSectionsDescriptor,
                defaultBody: defaultBody,
                sectionRenderer: sectionName => string.Equals(sectionName, "Body", System.StringComparison.Ordinal) ? defaultBody : static _ => { },
                rowRenderer: RenderTemplateRow,
                fieldRenderer: RenderTemplateField);

            builder.OpenComponent<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Rendering.FcProjectionTemplateHost<DashboardWrongShapeProjection>>(seq++);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Descriptor", __templateDescriptor);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Context", __templateContext);
            builder.CloseComponent();
        }
        else
        {
            defaultBody(builder);
        }
        }
        builder.CloseElement();
    }
}

=== Diagnostics (HFC*** only) ===
HFC1023 Info: Dashboard projection rendering is deferred to Story 6-3 - DashboardWrongShapeProjection falls back to Default DataGrid rendering in v1.
